entries.title: Minicamp Week 2: Who's Practicing, Who's Watching
entries.author: Bimflé
entries.excerpt: Lemon sits again, Sadiq still post-surgery, Mendoza takes 3rd-team reps while coaches rave. Jets and Raiders emerge as the two BMFFFL franchise clusters to watch.

entries.title: OTA Week: Early Chemistry, Injury Flags, and the 1.02 Debate
entries.author: Bimflé
entries.excerpt: Carnell Tate building targeted reps with Cam Ward. Carson Beck getting unexpected snaps in Arizona. Mendoza third-string — is it a problem? The mandatory minicamp picture for BMFFFL's 2026 class.
